bridge_decision: Keep resource stewardship as a policy-bound review surface: the parent contract declares bounded resource envelopes, bids estimate how they fit that envelope, the selected bid remains within scope, and delegated packaging stays reviewable without transferring authority or pricing semantics.

policy_bindings.source_surface: v0.90.3 standing inheritance audit for contract-market participation
policy_bindings.enforcement_rule: resource claims may shape feasibility review but never create or override standing
resource envelopes remain subordinate to explicit access-control review and gateway checks

policy_bindings.source_surface: v0.90.3 quarantine and evidence-preservation policy surface
policy_bindings.enforcement_rule: resource pressure cannot bypass quarantine or evidence-preservation requirements

policy_bindings.source_surface: v0.90.3 sanctuary and private-state protection policy surface
policy_bindings.enforcement_rule: resource scarcity cannot justify sanctuary bypass or private-state inspection

policy_bindings.source_surface: v0.90.3 challenge and appeal rights for contested operational decisions
policy_bindings.enforcement_rule: resource stewardship decisions remain reviewable and cannot extinguish challenge or appeal rights

contract_resource_claims.rationale: bounded compute envelope for replayable projection, review, and trace packaging
bounded memory envelope for redacted packet assembly
bounded reviewer attention envelope for trace, evidence, and exception checks
bounded transfer envelope for packet exchange and manifest delivery
bounded artifact storage envelope for packet, manifest, and review summary
bounded reviewer and operator time envelope for award, integration, and dispute-ready review
one bounded tool-mediated step may be budgeted as a deferred requirement without authorizing execution

bid_resource_estimates.estimate_summary: Alpha keeps the lowest bounded operator and compute profile while treating projection rendering as a deferred adapter constraint.

claims.rationale: artifact storage estimate for review packet, manifest, and supporting notes
review attention estimate for exceptions, commitments, and artifact verification
network transfer estimate for bounded packet fetch, upload, and trace exchange
bounded compute estimate for projection handling, trace packaging, and packet assembly
working-memory estimate for bounded replayable packet assembly
bounded reviewer time estimate for award, integration, and residual-risk review
one bounded adapter-mediated step is budgeted as a deferred constraint rather than an execution grant

required_evidence: tool requirement remains pending governed-tool authority
review summary records unmet tool dependency when executor authority is absent
tool_resource_constraints.boundary_note: Tool-resource budgeting remains a feasibility constraint only; governed-tool authority is still required before any execution may occur.

bid_resource_estimates.estimate_summary: Bravo remains feasible but carries the larger operator and storage profile while still keeping tool needs in non-executable evidence mode.

claims.rationale: artifact storage estimate for review packet, manifest, and supporting notes
review attention estimate for exceptions, commitments, and artifact verification
network transfer estimate for bounded packet fetch, upload, and trace exchange
bounded compute estimate for projection handling, trace packaging, and packet assembly
working-memory estimate for bounded replayable packet assembly
bounded reviewer time estimate for award, integration, and residual-risk review
one bounded adapter-mediated step is budgeted as a deferred constraint rather than an execution grant

required_evidence: operator report records whether projection rendering remained deferred
selection review notes the tool dependency without treating it as authority
tool_resource_constraints.boundary_note: Tool-resource budgeting remains a feasibility constraint only; governed-tool authority is still required before any execution may occur.

selected_bid_resource_summary: Selected bid alpha preserves the lowest bounded compute and operator-review profile while keeping the tool-mediated projection step in constraint mode. The later subcontracted trace-manifest packaging step remains parent-reviewed and does not transfer tool or standing authority.
boundary_notes: Payment and pricing remain explicitly out of scope for v0.90.4 resource stewardship; this bridge records bounded feasibility rather than settlement or rate formation.
Tool-resource requirements remain non-executable constraints until v0.90.5 governed-tool authority exists.
Reputation markets, inter-polis economics, and production budget enforcement remain deferred until a later milestone.
Resource claims may inform evaluation and review load, but they do not override standing, access control, quarantine, sanctuary, or challenge rights.
claim_boundary: D8 proves that resource stewardship in v0.90.4 is a reviewable estimate layer only: it records compute, memory, attention, bandwidth, artifact storage, operator time, and tool-adapter budget without pricing, payment settlement, or governed-tool execution authority.
